text: linkedin is just astrology for people who peaked in college
my manager sent me a quick sync invite at 4:58pm on a friday. this is violence.
ate cereal for dinner again. not because im sad. because im efficient.
your stomach thinks all potatos are mashed
my search history could end careers. plural.
i just liked my own post on accident and now i have to move cities
every email i send starts with sorry for the delay and at this point its my brand
told my therapist about my situationship and she literally sighed
if you microwave fish at work you belong in prison. this is not a hot take its the law
im convinced my cat is plotting something. he stares at the wall for hours
accidentally called my boss mom in a zoom call with 40 people. applying to new jobs rn
showerthought: we are all just houseplants with anxiety and student loans
my ex texted me happy birthday on the wrong day. the audacity of mediocrity
been on hold with comcast for 47 minutes. this is my joker origin story
the wifi at this hotel is so slow i just emotionally reconnected with my family
hot take: ranch dressing is just american tzatziki and you need to accept that
i have mass replied all to a company wide email. twice. in one week.
my dating profile says i love hiking but the last hike i did was to the fridge at 2am
every monday morning my body rejects capitalism on a cellular level
someone at work microwaved broccoli and i am now radicalized
told my date i was a crypto early adopter to sound cool. i bought at the top
my 3 year old asked why the moon follows us and honestly i dont know either
every standup meeting could be a slack message and im tired of pretending otherwise
i pretend to understand wine but its all just angry grape juice to me
if you say lets circle back one more time im going to scream into a pillow
accidentally sent a meme to my landlord instead of my rent. somehow that went better
im 34 and still dont know what a mortgage broker actually does
you ever flush and just stand there contemplating existence for a sec. just me?
my password is so old it could vote
normalize leaving parties without telling anyone. irish goodbye is self care
i put oat milk in my coffee and now i have opinions about gentrification
my coworker chews with his mouth open and i have considered violence
dating apps are just linkedin for your genitals
i googled is it normal to cry at costco and the answer was yes apparently
someone explain to me why lettuce exists. its crunchy water with no personality
my bank account and my will to live are in a race to zero
spent 3 hours debugging only to find a missing semicolon. considering a career in goat farming
conspiracy: big mattress invented daylight savings so youd buy new alarm clocks
my uber driver just asked me if i believe in god. sir this is a 4 minute ride
i eat shredded cheese straight from the bag at 1am like a raccoon and i feel no shame
accidentally liked my crush's photo from 2019. my thumb has betrayed me
hot take: people who back into parking spots have trust issues
if mercury is in retrograde one more time im going to file a complaint with nasa
you ever zone out so hard in a meeting you astral project
my neighbor mows his lawn at 7am on saturdays. i hope both sides of his pillow are warm
i have opened the fridge 6 times in 20 minutes expecting something new to appear
if i had a dollar for every unread email id have enough to retire from reading emails
my love language is sending memes at 3am with no context
someone just told me to be more proactive and i want to throw a chair
showerthought: your bed is a wireless charging station for humans
i just realized ive been pronouncing quinoa wrong for 8 years. nobody told me
my ex is dating someone who looks exactly like me but taller. im in my villain era now
every time i hear synergy i lose a year off my life
i told my plants good morning and one of them died anyway. ungrateful
the government doesnt want you to know that pigeons are free. you can just take them
wrote a cover letter that said i am passionate about data entry. we both know thats a lie
my fitbit congratulated me for steps i took walking to mcdonalds
i have 47 tabs open and every single one is a cry for help
normalize asking your waiter whats the most unhinged thing on this menu
my kid drew a picture of our family and i look like a potato with legs. fair honestly
the thing about rock bottom is it has a basement apparently
i told siri i loved her and she changed the subject. even AI wont commit
people who clap when the plane lands also clap when the microwave beeps
im not saying my coworker is useless but his spirit animal is a participation trophy
hot take: water is the best drink and yall are in denial
my dentist asked me when i last flossed and i felt like i was in an interrogation
i just sneezed so hard i think i time traveled
capitalism invented the alarm clock and i will never forgive it
my roommate eats my leftovers and then says oh i didnt know. you knew. you always knew
the audacity of indeed dot com sending me jobs that require 10 years experience. im 23
conspiracy: your phone listens to you but only to serve ads for things you already bought
im starting to think self care is just a marketing term for buying candles
accidentally wore my shirt inside out to work. nobody said anything. not one person. wow
someone said grind never stops and sir please it needs to stop im begging
i made eye contact with someone while eating a banana and now i have to leave the country
my screen time report is a war crime
hot take: raisins in cookies is a violation of the geneva convention
every time i say im fine im actually composing a resignation letter in my head
my shower thoughts have gotten so dark even the shampoo bottles are concerned
i put on real pants today for the first time in 5 days. personal growth
people who say lets agree to disagree just lost the argument and are being polite about it
my wifi name is FBI Surveillance Van and my neighbor hasnt made eye contact since
the five second rule is actually thirty seconds when nobody is watching
told my boss i had a doctors appointment. the doctor was my couch. the appointment was a nap
i have never once used algebra since high school. mrs henderson you lied to me
if your voicemail says leave a message just know i will absolutely not be doing that
the person who invented mondays and the person who invented alarm clocks are both in hell
my plant died and i feel like i failed as a parent. its a succulent. they survive deserts
every group project is just one person doing everything and four people saying great job
i waved back at someone who wasnt waving at me and now i live in the ocean
showerthought: taxes are just a subscription to the country you live in with no cancel button
my therapist charges me 150 an hour to tell me things my mom said for free
i dont trust people who say they dont like chocolate. what else are you hiding

the gym is just adult recess but everyone is angry and sweaty
i have been saying supposably instead of supposedly for 29 years. just found out today
my alexa laughed at 3am unprompted and i havent slept since
normalize ghosting plans you made when you were in a good mood
office small talk is just two people lying about their weekends simultaneously
i accidentally opened my front camera and jumpscared myself
